title: Munch & Crunch Stainless Steel Dog Bowl | 340ml Capacity for Small Dogs & Cats with Anti Slip Base (340ml Pet Bowl)
features: PERFECT SIZE FOR SMALL PETS: The 340ml capacity is just right for small dogs and cats, ensuring they have enough food or water for mealtime. It’s a great fit for puppies or toy breeds that require appropriately sized dog bowls to suit their needs.

DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL BOWL: Made from premium stainless steel, this bowl is rust-resistant, hygienic, and easy to clean. It’s a long-lasting addition to your dog accessories collection, ideal for daily use with wet or dry dog food.

ANTI-SLIP RUBBER RIM FOR STABILITY: The rubber rim prevents sliding and tipping, making mealtimes less messy. Whether it’s placed on a tiled kitchen floor or on the go during travel, this dog water bowl stays secure in its spot.

HYGIENIC & EASY TO CLEAN: The stainless steel surface resists odours and stains, making it easy to maintain. A quick rinse or run through the dishwasher ensures it’s always ready for your furry friend.
LIGHTWEIGHT & TRAVEL FRIENDLY: Compact and portable, this bowl is perfect for holidays, picnics, or walks. Slip it into your bag with ease and serve your pet’s food or water wherever you go.

IDEAL FOR FOOD OR WATER: Whether it’s a nutritious meal or a refreshing drink, this versatile bowl caters to all your pet’s needs. It’s an essential piece of dog stuff for both home and outdoor adventures.

STYLISH YET PRACTICAL: The sleek stainless steel finish and minimalist look make this bowl a timeless addition to any home. Its understated elegance also makes it a popular choice for gifts for dogs and their owners.
GREAT FOR PUPPIES & SMALL BREEDS: Designed with smaller pets in mind, this puppy bowl offers a convenient and safe feeding solution for younger dogs and smaller breeds.

THOUGHTFUL GIFT FOR PET LOVERS: Looking for the perfect dog Xmas gift? This practical and stylish bowl is an excellent choice for any pet parent who appreciates functional and thoughtful dog accessories.

ECO-FRIENDLY & BUILT TO LAST: By choosing a stainless steel dog bowl, you’re opting for a sustainable and reusable alternative to plastic. This durable design ensures years of use, benefiting both you and the planet.
description: Product Description Keep mealtime neat and enjoyable with the Munch & Crunch stainless steel dog bowl, designed for small dogs and cats. Its 340ml capacity is perfect for serving food or water, whether it's a hearty meal, a refreshing drink, or a treat. Crafted from durable stainless steel, this bowl is built to last, offering a hygienic and rust-resistant surface that’s easy to clean. The anti-slip rubber rim ensures the bowl stays in place, even during enthusiastic feeding times. Lightweight and compact, it’s a great addition to your collection of dog accessories, ideal for home or travel. This versatile puppy bowl is not just practical but stylish, making it an excellent gift for dog lovers or a thoughtful dog Xmas gift. Its timeless design complements any décor, while its practicality appeals to pet owners who value convenience and quality. Directions Clean regularly
